articles.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
articles.description: The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin holds $80,000 as stocks sink, yields rise on ugly inflation print
articles.description: Inflation rose to a three-year high in April, according to this morning's Consumer Price Index report.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: 韋伯太空望遠鏡驚見 120 億年前「混亂星系」，推翻星系演化時間表
articles.description: 在現今宇宙中，多數星系中的恆星皆規律地圍繞星系中心自轉，但在一些質量極大的「死亡星系」中，恆星運動卻呈現高度混 […]

articles.title: Bitcoin digests highest US CPI since 2023 as Fed rate hike woes return
articles.description: Bitcoin showed fresh signs of volatility as US CPI inflation saw new multiyear highs on oil price hikes thanks to the US-Iran war.

articles.title: LMAX Group launches digital asset collateral solution for institutions
articles.description: The new portal lets LMAX clients deposit digital assets into custody and use them as collateral to trade FX, metals, CFDs, perpetual futures and crypto.

articles.title: Spot XRP ETFs attract biggest inflows since January
articles.description: The five U.S.-listed spot XRP funds pulled in $25.8 million on Monday, the largest single-day net inflow since Jan. 5, even as ether spot ETFs shed nearly $17 million.

articles.title: Exodus sells over 1,000 Bitcoin as Q1 loss widens to $32M
articles.description: Exodus Movement reported a $32.1 million net loss in Q1, with revenue down 36.8% to $22.7 million amid a drop in monthly active users.

articles.title: North Korea ‘industrialized’ crypto theft, laundered billions: CertiK
articles.description: North Korea-linked hackers stole about $2.06 billion of the $3.4 billion lost in crypto hacks in 2025 and are moving from phishing to physical infiltration, CertiK’s new report finds.

articles.title: Bitcoin whale 'still short' BTC despite facing $13M in losses
articles.description: A growing cluster of bearish indicators points to a possible Bitcoin pullback toward $71,000, potentially easing the whale’s $13 million net losses.

articles.title: Bitcoin may avoid historic bear market losses as ETF flows grow, says analyst
articles.description: The current Bitcoin bear market drawdown is far smaller than previous bear markets, as steady ETF inflows and corporate Bitcoin buying continue to absorb selling pressure.

articles.title: France’s central banker Beau clashes with Lagarde over private digital euro plans
articles.description: France’s central bank deputy governor told CoinDesk public and private European entities need to get involved in digital asset development, diverging sharply from Christine Lagarde’s stance.

articles.title: Roaring Kitty-linked RKC memecoin crashes as developer cashes out $729K
articles.description: A Solana memecoin linked to Roaring Kitty’s X account crashed after its developer cashed out $729,000, raising hack and sniping concerns.

articles.title: EBay rejects GameStop’s $56 billion bid, putting bitcoin exposure back in focus
articles.description: The online marketplace's board called the half-cash, half-stock offer "neither credible nor attractive" Tuesday.

articles.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
articles.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

articles.title: Four signs that Bitcoin has recovered to ‘full’ bullish momentum
articles.description: Expanding Bitcoin price momentum, recovering liquidity and surging network activity all point to continued bullish control.

articles.title: Kraken parent, Franklin Templeton to develop onchain investment products
articles.description: The partnership will focus on tokenized yield products, blockchain-based funds and institutional crypto markets.

articles.title: Elliptic raises $120 million backed by Nasdaq, Deutsche Bank as AI reshapes crypto security
articles.description: The crypto analytics firm plans to expand its AI-powered monitoring tools as stablecoins and tokenized finance grow rapidly, CEO Simone Maini said.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 4.9%, as index trades lower
articles.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 4.4% from Monday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

articles.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
articles.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.
